desktop-companion.label: Desktop companions
desktop-companion.description: Apps that put a Petdex pet on your desktop.

wellness.label: Wellness & focus
wellness.description: Pomodoros, breaks, and focus tools that use Petdex pets as their on-screen character.

wearable.label: Wearable
wearable.description: Petdex pets running on Apple Watch, Garmin, and other wearables.

sdk.label: SDKs & runtimes
sdk.description: Libraries and runtimes that wrap the Petdex API or pet format for other platforms.

bundled.label: Bundled in larger apps
bundled.description: Petdex pets shipped as a feature of bigger products.

pet-creator.label: Pet creators
pet-creator.description: Solo creators distributing original pets in Petdex package format.

projects.name: PawPause
projects.tagline: Wellness companion that keeps a Petdex pet on screen and nudges you to pause, hydrate, and stay focused.

evidence.quote: PetDex compatibility: PawPause reads companions installed to ~/.codex/pets.

projects.name: FocusPal
projects.tagline: Pomodoro companion app for macOS that imports a Petdex pet via /focuspal petdex <slug>.

evidence.quote: Fetches https://petdex.crafter.run/api/manifest to look up the canonical spritesheet URL.

projects.name: petdex-dock
projects.tagline: Tiny Codex pet that lives at the edge of your desktop, installable from the Petdex gallery.

evidence.quote: Uses the PetDex public gallery for Codex-compatible animated pets. npx petdex install [pet]

projects.name: petdex-cc
projects.tagline: Desktop pet for Claude Code with 8-level progression, AI speech bubbles, and time-aware greetings. Pulls from 1,569+ Petdex pets.

evidence.quote: Pick any pet from Petdex (1,569+ community pets). Pets powered by Petdex.

projects.name: Codux
projects.tagline: Native macOS terminal workspace for AI coding tools with a built-in Petdex marketplace for the in-app pet companion.

projects.name: BitFun
projects.tagline: Rust-based desktop Agent runtime suite with Petdex companion packages as a first-class type. CSS animations named bitfun-petdex-walk.

evidence.quote: /// Optional Petdex-compatible companion package selected by the user.

projects.name: Codex Pet Watch Sprite
projects.tagline: Swift Package + iOS/watchOS demo that renders Petdex pets on Apple Watch complications, with a built-in Petdex gallery picker.

evidence.quote: iOS デモアプリには Petdex manifest (https://petdex.crafter.run/api/manifest) から一覧を取得し、選択した pet の spritesheetUrl をアプリ内キャッシュへ保存

projects.name: garmin-pet
projects.tagline: Pipeline that exports Petdex pets to Garmin watch face PNG frames. Wearable adapter for runners.

projects.name: petdex-swift
projects.tagline: Community Swift Package that wraps the public Petdex API. iOS example app included.

evidence.quote: A lightweight Swift Package for the public Petdex API.

projects.name: OpenPet
projects.tagline: Local desktop pet runtime for AI agents (CLI / MCP / HTTP) with Petdex import support.

projects.name: Omniget
projects.tagline: Open-source desktop study app (Hotmart, Udemy, PDFs, EPUBs) with a built-in pet mascot system that pulls from Petdex.

projects.name: Petdex Cute
projects.tagline: Original pet pack (Aka Pilot, Homelander) distributed through the Petdex gallery.

projects.name: Petdex Zaizai
projects.tagline: Single original pet (Zaizai, a round golden cat) packaged for Petdex submission.

evidence.quote: Petdex Zaizai 桌面小宠项目 — distributed as zaizai-petdex.zip

projects.name: nom
projects.tagline: Shimeji-style desktop pet that eats the AI tokens you burn through Claude Code and Codex CLI. Auto-loads any pet installed via npx petdex install.

evidence.quote: Skin support: install any petdex pack with npx petdex install <slug>, then right-click 选择宠物 to switch on the fly.

projects.name: TermiPet
projects.tagline: macOS desktop pet companion for Claude Code and terminal workflows, with Petdex/Codex-compatible pet import, AI status cards, quick commands, and local-first pet chat.

evidence.quote: TermiPet can import **Petdex / Codex-compatible pet packages**: in Settings -> Pets, choose a pet folder containing `pet.json` and `spritesheet.webp`.

projects.name: FunHarness Studio
projects.tagline: Local AI Agent GUI with a built-in Petdex-powered desktop pet panel for Windows agent workflows.

evidence.quote: 用户可以在左侧导航栏打开宠物面板，从 Petdex 社区精选图鉴中挑选喜欢的像素宠物，也可以上传自定义 Sprite Sheet。
